events: draw omega and xi; orthogonalize xi to valid instruments in this designed finite population
merge z_cost into marginal cost before pricing
construct z_invalid = xi + noise after outcomes
merge z_invalid only into estimation table

claims.valid: z_cost is observed before pricing, shifts marginal cost and price, and is exactly orthogonal to designed xi
claims.invalid: z_invalid is constructed after outcomes and contains xi, so it violates the demand exclusion; it is never input to pricing
